name: AD Mixtape · Abstract Truths: An Evolving Jazz Compendium — Volume Four
description: Volume four of Abstract Truths. If unfamiliar with the series, please first read here about the its genesis and intention. For this installment we tapped bay area record collector/muso David Katznelson. Katznelson likens the genre to a "wild animal...a cuddle by a fire place; it pushes up against it and provides a respite from the
